subcodes.first_line: Praise, hallowed beyond the mention of all who praise or are praised, befitteth that Dawning-Place of the Light of Oneness, His Holiness Muhammad [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر حامد و محمود مطلع نور احد حضرت محمد را لایق و سزاست که
subcodes.subjects: @Muhammad; Islam, @unity; oneness of humanity, @exhortations and counsels, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @unity in diversity, @martyrs and martyrdom
